title: Campus Project · Presensi SMPN 2 Paliyan — School Attendance
points: Sistem presensi sekolah berbasis IoT (proyek pengabdian/kampus, kerja tim) — sudah terpasang dan dipakai untuk presensi harian di SMPN 2 Paliyan.
Kontribusi saya: firmware ESP32 dan perakitan hardware alat gerbang — RFID RC522, keypad, LCD, RTC DS3231, Ethernet W5500, SD card, dan UPS backup.
Alat tahan gangguan: store-and-forward ke SD card saat jaringan putus dan UPS saat listrik padam; watchdog + reboot terjadwal untuk operasi 24/7.

title: Commissioned IoT Builder · VIBRADoor
points: Built VIBRADoor, a wireless vibrating doorbell for deaf students at SLB Damayanti Sleman — a commissioned project; one pair deployed and still running daily.
Owned the ESP32 firmware and hardware assembly of both the transmitter and the wearable, communicating over a self-hosted MQTT (Mosquitto) broker.
Designed for field maintenance: custom PCB with swappable modules and LiPo + TP4056 power; total BOM Rp 366k per pair.

title: Competition Project · PAYCAY — Smart EV Charging
points: Developed PAYCAY, an end-to-end smart EV charging station (SPKLU) management system for a competition — built solo across firmware, backend, web, and mobile.
ESP32 firmware (PZEM-004T metering + RC522 RFID + AC relay), Flask backend with a real-time Socket.IO dashboard, Firebase Realtime DB, and a Flutter companion app.
Deployed live on Microsoft Azure App Service; applied advanced Python (OOP, ABC, decorators, design patterns).

title: Lab Assistant · Data Acquisition Systems (IoT Concentration)
points: Assist the Data Acquisition practicum (semester 6, IoT concentration): guiding students through sensor reading, data logging, and telemetry on ESP32.
Prepare weekly practicum materials and help debug student wiring and firmware during lab sessions.
Co-authored beginner MQTT tutorials used as supplementary reading.

title: Lab Assistant · Hardware Development
points: Assisted the Hardware Development practicum (semester 4): microcontroller fundamentals and component-level wiring with Arduino and ESP32.
Maintained lab equipment inventory and prepared weekly practicum kits.
